title: quercus robur var. patellulata
intro: Quercus robur var. patellulata is a variety of the pedunculate oak tree, known for its distinctive leaf shape and medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of this plant contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which have been traditionally used for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus robur var. patellulata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and digestive problems.
